name: Easter Eggs Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the Confectioners sugar and Cream of tartar.
2. Add the softened Butter to the sugar mixture and beat until fluffy.
3. Gradually add in the Water, corn syrup, Vanilla, Salt, and Almond extract while stirring continuously.
4. Once all ingredients are incorporated, slowly fold in the Flaked coconut.
5. Pour the batter into an ungreased baking dish lined with parchment paper.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until firm.
7. Remove from the refrigerator and gently press down on the mixture to form Easter egg shapes.
8. Allow the candies to cool completely before serving.
